description_long: This is a modern mountain bicycle with a lightweight, angular diamond frame painted in a vibrant green color. It features two large, knobby tires designed for off-road and urban terrain, mounted on black alloy rims. The handlebars are flat and straight, equipped with ergonomic grips and standard brake levers. The drivetrain includes a visible rear derailleur and multiple gears, indicating a geared system for variable resistance. The seat is a standard saddle, slightly padded and mounted on an adjustable seat post. The bicycle is shown resting on a patch of gray pavement, with no basket or rack attached.
description: A green mountain bicycle with a diamond frame, flat handlebars, and two large knobby tires, designed for urban and off-road use. It features a standard saddle and a multi-gear drivetrain.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the green diamond frame, flat handlebars, and both wheels clearly, with the drivetrain and pedals visible.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the rear wheel, derailleur, and the back of the saddle, with the handlebars angled away.
description_view_2: Right-side view displaying the full length of the frame, both wheels, and the gear system, with the seat and handlebars in profile.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the front wheel, fork, and handlebars, with the frame and seat partially visible.
